mapper.select: SELECT * FROM ai_client_config WHERE source_type = #{sourceType} AND source_id = #{sourceId} AND status = 1
SELECT * FROM ai_client_config ORDER BY create_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ai_client_config (source_type, source_id, target_type, target_id, ext_param, status) VALUES (#{sourceType}, #{sourceId}, #{targetType}, #{targetId}, #{extParam}, IFNULL(#{status}, 1))
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM ai_client_config WHERE source_type = #{sourceType} AND source_id = #{sourceId}
